title: Tititcraft
description: A modpack that focuses on Cobblemon and Create. Other mods related to farming and quality of life are also included. Plenty of included optimization mods will also help in allowing the modpack to run smoothly
body:
Tititcraft is a Minecraft modpack that allows players to explore the world while capturing and battling Pokemon. After all the adventuring, there are plenty of mods that will help you make the perfect home with an abundance of furniture mods. Use the farmer's delight mod to create food that will satisfy you when you are hungry. Use the Create mod to help automate all the harvesting and crafting you would be doing instead of adventuring.

Here are some of the features of the Tititcraft modpack:

Pokemon
Automation
Trains
Waystones
Furniture Blocks
New crops, foods, and recipes
Backpacks
Tons of Performance optimization mods
and other quality-of-life mods
